text:
On 06/17/11 16:11, Chris Rees wrote:
> Hi Jimmie,

> Sorry your PR has sat around a while. Are you still able to reproduce
> this behaviour?
>

>

It's now become moot, since XFCE4.8 was imported.
BROKEN=         Does not work with xfce 4.8

So I guess it's best that the PR be closed.

Thanks.
